title: Relate Subtraction and Division
essential_question: How is subtraction related to division?
strategies: Subtract the same number again and again until you reach 0.
Count how many times you subtracted — that's the quotient.

learn.title: Repeated Subtraction
learn.content: Division can be shown by subtracting the same number until you reach 0. The number of times you subtract is the answer (quotient). Example: 18 ÷ 6 → subtract 6 three times to reach 0 → 18 ÷ 6 = 3.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.6 Lesson 6.5 'Relate Subtraction and Division' pp.237-240
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 1 Topic D — Repeated Subtraction and Division
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: Step-by-Step Example
learn.content: 18 ÷ 6: Start with 18. Subtract 6: 18 − 6 = 12. Subtract 6: 12 − 6 = 6. Subtract 6: 6 − 6 = 0. You subtracted 3 times, so 18 ÷ 6 = 3.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.6 Lesson 6.5 'Relate Subtraction and Division' pp.237-240
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 1 Topic D — Repeated Subtraction and Division
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: Number Line Model
learn.content: Start at the total on a number line. Jump back by the divisor. Count the jumps. For 20 ÷ 4: start at 20, jump back 4 five times: 20 → 16 → 12 → 8 → 4 → 0. Five jumps → 20 ÷ 4 = 5.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.6 Lesson 6.5 'Relate Subtraction and Division' pp.237-240
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 1 Topic D — Repeated Subtraction and Division
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: Number Line: Counting Jumps
learn.content: For 30 ÷ 5: start at 30 on a number line. Jump back 5 each time: 30 → 25 → 20 → 15 → 10 → 5 → 0. Count the jumps: 6. So 30 ÷ 5 = 6. Each backward jump removes one equal group.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.6 Lesson 6.5 'Relate Subtraction and Division' pp.237-240
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 1 Topic D — Repeated Subtraction and Division
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: Subtraction and Division Are Related
learn.content: Repeated subtraction and division always give the same answer. 24 ÷ 8: subtract 8 three times (24→16→8→0) OR use the related fact (8 × 3 = 24). Both show 24 ÷ 8 = 3. Division is a shortcut for repeated subtraction.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.6 Lesson 6.5 'Relate Subtraction and Division' pp.237-240
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 1 Topic D — Repeated Subtraction and Division
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: 반복뺄셈 루틴 — 0이 될 때까지 빼는 횟수
learn.content: 나눗셈은 같은 수를 0이 될 때까지 반복해서 빼는 것. 예: 12 ÷ 4 풀려면 12에서 4를 몇 번 빼야 0이 되나?   12 − 4 = 8 (1번), 8 − 4 = 4 (2번), 4 − 4 = 0 (3번) → 답 3. 단계 1) 시작값을 적기 (12). 단계 2) 같은 수(4)를 반복해서 빼기. 단계 3) 0에 도달할 때까지 횟수 세기 — 그 횟수가 답. 흔한 실수 (M01): 단순 뺄셈으로 끝내는 학생 (12 − 4 = 8) — 0까지 반복해야 함.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.6 Lesson 6.5 'Relate Subtraction and Division' pp.237-240
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 1 Topic D — Repeated Subtraction and Division
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: 수직선으로 점프 — 분배 나눗셈 시각화
learn.content: 수직선에서 시작값에서 0까지 같은 크기로 점프. 예: 30 ÷ 5 → 30에서 시작해 5씩 뒤로 점프 → 25, 20, 15, 10, 5, 0. 점프 횟수 = 6 → 30 ÷ 5 = 6. 팁: 점프마다 손가락 하나씩 — 끝나면 손가락 수가 답. 🔍 검증: 마지막에 정확히 0에 도달하는지 확인 (도달 안 하면 계산 오류).

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.6 Lesson 6.5 'Relate Subtraction and Division' pp.237-240
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 1 Topic D — Repeated Subtraction and Division
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: 뺄셈 ↔ 나눗셈 — 같은 답을 두 가지 방법으로
learn.content: 반복뺄셈 횟수 = 나눗셈의 답. 예: 28에서 7을 4번 빼면 0 → 28 ÷ 7 = 4. 예: 36에서 9를 4번 빼면 0 → 36 ÷ 9 = 4. 역으로 풀어도 됨: 28 ÷ 7 = 4 → 7을 4번 빼면 0. 팁: 큰 수(56 ÷ 8)는 곱셈으로 더 빨리 (8 × 7 = 56 → 7). 반복뺄셈은 작은 수에서 의미를 이해하는 도구.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.6 Lesson 6.5 'Relate Subtraction and Division' pp.237-240

hints: If you subtract 4 six times, you remove 4 × 6 = 24 in total.
The starting number must be 24. Check: 24 − 4 − 4 − 4 − 4 − 4 − 4 = 0.

feedback.correct: Correct! Subtracting 4 six times removes 4 × 6 = 24. So 24 ÷ 4 = 6.
feedback.incorrect: 6 subtractions of 4 = 4 × 6 = 24. The starting number is 24.

practice_r2.question: Which division can be solved by subtracting 4 six times? __ ÷ 4 = 6
practice_r2.feedback_correct: Correct! Subtracting 4 six times removes 4 × 6 = 24. So 24 ÷ 4 = 6.

practice_r3.explanation: 72 ÷ 8 = 9. Subtract 8 nine times from 72 to reach 0.
hints: Each day subtracts 8 liters. Subtract 8 from 72 repeatedly until you reach 0.

feedback.correct: Correct! 72 − 8 nine times = 0, so the tank empties in 9 days.
feedback.incorrect: Subtract 8 from 72 daily: 72→64→56→...→0. Count 9 steps = 9 days.

practice_r3.question: A tank holds 72 liters. Every day, 8 liters are removed. After how many days will the tank be empty?
practice_r3.feedback_correct: Correct! 72 − 8 nine times = 0, so the tank empties in 9 days.
